name: CarShake
description: GPS-verified photo evidence for valet, rental, and parking disputes. Free AI damage cost estimator and MCP tools.

tools.name: estimate_damage_cost
tools.description: Estimate repair costs for valet/parking car damage (scratch, dent, door ding, curb rash, bumper, keyed). Returns USD cost range by damage type + vehicle + severity.

tools.name: valet_damage_guide
tools.description: Step-by-step guidance on what to do if a valet damages your car. Includes legal rights, insurance steps, and evidence best practices.

tools.name: lookup_car_protection
tools.description: Look up vehicle protection scenarios: valet parking, airport parking, car rental, body shop, car wash, dealership, concert parking, event valet.
